selections.name: Morlock
selections.reason: Top-rated runner with strong early speed figures. Well drawn in barrier 1 to find a forward position easily on this spacious track.

selections.name: Victorium
selections.reason: Strong metropolitan form lines. Excels with cut in the ground and gets the services of a top rider.

selections.name: Glitzy Golden Girl
selections.reason: Consistent form profile. Showed rapid improvement last start and maps to get a sweet run just behind the speed.

selections.name: Pure Crown
selections.reason: Honest performer who will appreciate the Soft 6 conditions. Capable of filling a minor spot.

danger_horse.name: Victorium
danger_horse.reason: Brings elite class figures to this race and handles the wet track conditions perfectly.

selections.name: Elrond
selections.reason: Boasts superior speed ratings and is third-up today. Ready to peak and handles soft going well.

selections.name: Fullheadofsteam
selections.reason: Consistent provincial performer who is always in the mix. Will appreciate the long straight.

selections.name: Karma Queen
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing. Drawn to get a soft run midfield and finish off strongly.

selections.name: Calm The Press
selections.reason: Possesses solid raw ability. Capable of showing sharp improvement on a soft surface.

danger_horse.name: Fullheadofsteam
danger_horse.reason: Maps perfectly to stalk the speed and has the late sectionals to challenge late.

selections.name: Amical
selections.reason: Promising type who has shown good tactical speed in trials. Ideal starting point here.

selections.name: Mr Vexatious
selections.reason: Solid debut effort indicates talent. Will appreciate the extra room on the Gifford Hill course.

selections.name: Shamus In Pontivy
selections.reason: Wide draw is less of a concern on this track. Strong late closer who will relish the 450m straight.

selections.name: Star Serpent
selections.reason: Fitter now and gets a nice weight relief. Can sneak into the first four.

danger_horse.name: Mr Vexatious
danger_horse.reason: Has the tactical speed to overcome any minor bias and has been well-supported early.

selections.name: Navy Rok
selections.reason: Class runner of the field who gets the perfect map from barrier 5. Peak fitness now.

selections.name: Contrary
selections.reason: Lightly weighted and progressive. Will appreciate stepping up to the mile on this spacious track.

selections.name: No Bail
selections.reason: Drawn to get a soft run on the rail. Hard fit and handles soft tracks well.

selections.name: Winston's Pride
selections.reason: Showed good improvement last start. Can settle closer from the low draw.

danger_horse.name: Contrary
danger_horse.reason: Gets a significant weight advantage and has the scope to improve rapidly over this distance.

selections.name: Frontpoint
selections.reason: Brings the highest raw speed figures into the race. The wide draw is mitigated by the long run down the back.

selections.name: I Am Ralph
selections.reason: Saves ground from the inside alley. Strong wet track performer who will be hitting the line hard.

selections.name: Allegedly
selections.reason: Capable on his day and gets a nice weight relief. Can surprise at odds.

selections.name: Fight For Freedom
selections.reason: Veteran campaigner who loves the soft going. Drawn to get a very economical run.

danger_horse.name: I Am Ralph
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw allows him to settle closer than usual, making him a major threat on a soft surface.

selections.name: Wimmera Star
selections.reason: Class drop is significant here. Powerful late surge will be highly effective on this long straight.

selections.name: Suit Of Wands
selections.reason: In peak form and handles the distance with ease. Big track suits his sweeping style.

selections.name: Petit Eagle
selections.reason: Consistent provincial performer who handles all track conditions. Major player.

selections.name: Fiabesca
selections.reason: Progressive type stepping up in distance. Light weight gives her an each-way chance.

danger_horse.name: Suit Of Wands
danger_horse.reason: A proven stayer in this grade who will relish the soft track and long home straight.

selections.name: Nostryia
selections.reason: Elite speed ratings for this grade. Wide draw is not a major penalty on this 30m wide track.

selections.name: Xtramagic
selections.reason: Drawn to get a soft run. Strong wet track form and gets a key jockey change.

selections.name: Rocktagon
selections.reason: Consistent sprinter who handles the soft going. Will be finishing off strongly.

selections.name: Charlesfort
selections.reason: Keeps finding the line. Honest type who can sneak into the exotics at value.

danger_horse.name: Xtramagic
danger_horse.reason: Boasts excellent soft track statistics and maps to get a highly economical run.
